title: ourisia breviflora
intro: Ourisia breviflora, commonly known as the rock daisy, is a flowering plant species native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Ourisia breviflora can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
